title: My preferences
subtitle: Personal preferences the agent learned from your actions (W1) — they only affect your own builds
empty: No personal preferences yet — edit a phase on the plan confirmation card and the agent will record your preference here

prefs.pageSubtitle: The agent carries these preferences into every conversation (the index line is its recall cue). Saying “remember: …” in chat adds one here after you confirm; ask “what do you remember about me” anytime to audit.
prefs.emptyHint: No preferences yet — try telling the agent “remember: I always look at 7 days”, or add one below.
prefs.deleteConfirm: Delete this preference? The agent will stop applying it.
prefs.indexLabel: Index line (when should the agent recall this)
prefs.validate: Index line and content are both required
